name: Captivating Hypnotic Spiral
outcome: [TargetName]'s thoughts seem to fade away as the spiral endlessly spins in front of [TargetHisOrHer] eyes, flooding [TargetHisOrHer] mind with pleasurable submission that makes [TargetHisOrHer] cock twitch.
miss: [TargetName] manages to close [TargetHisOrHer] eyes for a few moments, ignoring the swirling magic spiral before an aching compulsion forces them open again.
statusOutcome: You can feel your thoughts drifting into blissful trance as the spiral soaks in all of your focus...
